holdings.infoBox: CZA is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 2.56%, State Street at 2.21%, Humana at 2.15%, American International Group at 1.99%, and Public Service Enterprise Group at 1.91%.

overview.description: The Invesco Zacks Mid-Cap ETF (CZA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Zacks Mid Cap Core index. The fund holds a proprietary-selected portfolio of 100 mid-cap US stocks. The fund seeks to outperform pure market-cap indexes. CZA was launched on Apr 2, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
